svg.text: Connected medallion workflow with integrity and security control placement
Control Layer Embedded Into The Workflow
S3 versioning, object lock, retention policy, replay from bronze
Deterministic event keys, watermarking, idempotent MERGE into facts
Access anomalies, delete events, lag spikes, quarantine-rate alerts
1. Raw truth stays recoverable from bronze and stream retention.
2. Duplicates are suppressed before silver and gold promotion.
3. Tampering or unauthorized deletion is visible through audit and anomaly signals.
4. Gold can be rebuilt from trusted upstream layers instead of being the only copy.
